welcome_text:
I am a bot for uploading screenshots and videos from FiveM / RedM to **Fivemanage** CDN.

📸 Send me any file here — I will upload it and return a direct link.

🔑 **To get started, you need to configure your API key:**
1. Create a free account: https://fivemanage.com
2. Go to https://app.fivemanage.com → **API Keys**
3. Create a key of type **Media**
4. Click the **Enter API Key** button below
select_language: Please select your language / Пожалуйста, выберите язык:

api_key_not_found_delete: ❌ API key not found. Maybe you deleted it.
help_text:
Bot for uploading screenshots and videos from FiveM / RedM to Fivemanage CDN.
Each user uses **their own** free Fivemanage account.

## 🚀 How to start

**1.** Create a free account at: https://fivemanage.com
**2.** Go to dashboard: https://app.fivemanage.com
**3.** Open **API Keys** and create a **Media** type key
**4.** Copy it and click **Enter API Key** button below

*(You can also use `/setkey apikey:YOUR_TOKEN`)*

## 📤 Uploading files

For security and privacy, you must **send files to the bot in Direct Messages**.
Simply drag and drop an image, video, or audio file — the bot will upload it and return a direct CDN link.

## 🔧 Commands

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/setkey apikey:TOKEN` | Save your API key |
| `/language` | Change bot language |
| `/status` | Check if key is configured |
| `/removekey` | Remove saved key |
| `/help` | Show this instruction |

## ❓ FAQ

**Is it free?** — Yes, Fivemanage free tier includes file storage.
**Is my key safe?** — The key is encrypted and stored securely.
**Can I use it on a server?** — Yes, but commands in servers will reply to your DMs privately.

🔑 Haven't set up your key yet? Click the button below or type `/start`.
